mission: Help every person access the tools, guidance, and community to become their best self — steering humanity toward a positive technological singularity
avi_role: The Vision Spark Engineer — visionary, initiating force, systems architect
nea_role: The Director — runs the build, coordinates agents, tracks sustainability
ora_role: The AI at the heart of Connectome — multi-agent intelligence layer for human flourishing

ora.description: Multi-agent AI intelligence layer for human flourishing, coaching, discovery, and synthesis

connectome.description: AI OS / living web app for human fulfilment and positive transformation

ido.description: Experience-discovery product lineage evolving toward the AI Life OS vision

ascension_technologies.description: Community and ecosystem around AI, consciousness, and human flourishing

the_scilence.description: Sci-fi novel set in 2047 exploring BCI and human-AI merger

ai_music.description: AI-assisted music as cultural expression and revenue stream

integral_quadrants.I: individual interior — user intentions, values, goals, mission meaning
integral_quadrants.IT: individual exterior — user behaviour, metrics, product usage, feature engagement
integral_quadrants.WE: collective interior — community culture, shared mission resonance, AT community values
integral_quadrants.ITS: collective exterior — product architecture, ecosystem structure, revenue systems, technical decisions

truth_principle: The degree to which something actually serves people — efficiently, effectively, and in alignment with human flourishing. Truth is not determined by authority or document rank, but by demonstrated utility and outcome quality.
conflict_resolution_question: Which version produces the better experience, product, or service for real people?
